01:40 AM Letter 🌙

Hey... Dekh kuch baate jo shayad kabhi bol nahi paya. Tu genuinely best logon mein se ek hai jo meri life mein aaye. Thank you for staying. ❤️

💌 One Small Question

Dosti mein main shayad perfect nahi hu. Kuch sudharna ho to bata dena ❤️


Thank you for being honest 🙂❤️

Huhhhhhhh... 😭

💗 Ek Aur Baat

Dekh, tu consider kar sakti hai mujhe. Agar chahe. Teri marzi hai. Bas kehna tha. ❤️

I'm always waiting for your answer.

🌙 What If...

Agar hum kabhi mile hi na hote...

Zindagi chal rahi hoti. Bas thodi kam interesting hoti. 🙂

Reason dene ki zaroorat nahi hai.

Kaisa laga? Bahut mehnat se banaya hai. Koi insta template se nahi uthaya. ❤️

Happiest Friendship Day Ayuu 🙂❤️

Thank you for every memory.
Thank you for every laugh.
Thank you for staying.
